summary: C++ compilation failed while building the SIMD moments code: the compiler reports invalid explicit instantiation of 'operator()' in moments_simd.hpp and moments_inst_neon.cpp, causing the ninja build to stop and metadata generation to fail.
root_cause: Clang++ compilation error: explicit instantiation of 'operator()' in ../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp (and moments_inst_neon.cpp) does not refer to a function template, variable template, member function, member class, or static data member, causing the build to fail.

evidence.reason: Shows the compilation step that failed for the NEON SIMD moments instantiation object file.

evidence.quote: ../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp:255:50: error: explicit instantiation of 'operator()' does not refer to a function template, variable template, member function, member class, or static data member
evidence.reason: Direct compiler error pointing to the explicit instantiation problem in moments_simd.hpp at line 255.

evidence.quote: ../../pandas/_libs/simd/moments_inst_neon.cpp:14:43: error: explicit instantiation of 'operator()' does not refer to a function template, variable template, member function, member class, or static data member
evidence.reason: Compiler error repeated for the NEON instantiation source, indicating the same invalid explicit instantiation is present in moments_inst_neon.cpp.
Confirms the compiler produced an error that stopped compilation.
Shows the build system halted due to the compilation error.
Indicates the packaging/metadata generation failed as a result of the build failure.

suggested_fix: Correct or remove the invalid explicit instantiation of 'operator()' referenced in ../../pandas/_libs/include/pandas/simd/moments_simd.hpp (line 255) and ../../pandas/_libs/simd/moments_inst_neon.cpp (line 14) so it targets a valid function/template/member, then rebuild (e.g., adjust the template/operator definition or the instantiation syntax and run the build again).
